title: Home Coordinate Save
description: Dont find your house? Just press the button before going anywhere, and your home coordinates got saved
body:
🏠 Home Coordinate Save
Wandered too far and lost your home? Not anymore.

This simple yet life-saving Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 lets you save your home coordinates with a single keypress — and recall them anytime you need. No need for waypoints, no messy notes, just quick access when you need it most.

🎮 How it works:
🔘 Press H → your current location is saved as your "home".

🧭 Press K → your saved home coordinates pop up on screen.

That’s it. No fancy GUI, no overcomplication. Just you, the world, and a handy little shortcut to find your way back.

🔧 Details:
Minecraft version: 1.20.1

Modloader: Forge

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Lightweight – no performance impact.

💡 Tips:
Set your home right in the middle of your base or near your bed for quick returns.

Perfect for survival players who like to explore but hate getting lost.

Works great on its own or alongside other exploration mods.
